suggestions.issue: <conbody> exists but has no child elements or text content
suggestions.suggestion:
exists but has no child elements or text content. The body element exists but has no content — this topic renders blank. Add at least one child element (`

`, `

`, `
    `, etc.) with meaningful content, or remove the topic if it is no longer needed.

suggestions.issue: <shortdesc> element is missing — required for search previews and navigation
suggestions.suggestion:
<shortdesc> element is missing — required for search previews and navigation.
Add a `<shortdesc>` element immediately after the `<title>` element. Write 1–2 sentences (max 30 words) summarising the topic purpose. Avoid generic openers like 'This topic describes...'.

suggestions.issue: <image> #1 (href='../media/image35.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility
context_lines: Main Screen and Popup Window for the Silo Loading Operation
suggestions.suggestion:
<image> #1 (href='../media/image35.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility.
Add an `alt` attribute to the `<image>` element with a brief description of what the image shows.
Example: `<image href='../media/image.png' alt='Description of image content'/>`

suggestions.issue: <image> #1 (href='../media/image56.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility
context_lines: • Network – shows how the individual network components are connected, and whether they communicate with each other.
• Maintenance – provides an overview of the connected PLC systems and their underlaying Profinet devices.
• Scale Adjustment – displays the status of the minors scales, and is used to calibrate them.
suggestions.suggestion:
<image> #1 (href='../media/image56.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility.
Add an `alt` attribute to the `<image>` element with a brief description of what the image shows.
Example: `<image href='../media/image.png' alt='Description of image content'/>`

suggestions.issue: <table> #1 has no <title> element — required for accessibility and DITA compliance
suggestions.suggestion:
<table> #1 has no <title> element — required for accessibility and DITA compliance.
Add a `<title>` element as the first child of the `<table>` element.
Example: `<table><title>Descriptive table title</title><tgroup ...>`

suggestions.issue: <image> #1 (href='../media/image1.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility
context_lines: <note type="note">The Zippe system has two SCADA operator stations (based on Windows 10). One station is in the SBS control room, and the other is in the melter control room. The screens available through the operator stations are used to control and monitor operations, and respond to alarms.</note>
As shown below on the main menu, each screen is divided into three sections: Overview Area at the top, Working Area in the middle, and Button Bar at the bottom.

The top section of the screen provides the operator with an overview of the entire batch plant that for monitoring and detection of problems. The image below explains the purpose of each of these buttons.
suggestions.suggestion:
<image> #1 (href='../media/image1.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility.
Add an `alt` attribute to the `<image>` element with a brief description of what the image shows.
Example: `<image href='../media/image.png' alt='Description of image content'/>`

suggestions.issue: <image> #1 (href='../media/image38.png') has no alt text — required for accessibility
context_lines: • Names – used to assign names and numbers to each batch.
• Consumption – shows the amount of material used from each silo over time.
• Batch Protocol – provides details on each material in a batch including the weight added and its target value, and the start and stop dosing times.
Main Screen and Popup Window for the Batch System Operation

context_lines: • Formula - pressing the button opens a Formula screen

suggestions.issue: <prolog> element is missing — AI (Layer 3) should have added prolog with keywords and indexterms
suggestions.suggestion:
<prolog> element is missing — AI (Layer 3) should have added prolog with keywords and indexterms.
Add a `<prolog>` element after `<shortdesc>` (or after `<title>` if shortdesc is absent) containing metadata and keywords:
`<prolog><metadata><keywords><keyword>term</keyword></keywords></metadata></prolog>`

<taskbody> has no <steps> or <steps-unordered> element.
A task topic must have a `<steps>` element inside `<taskbody>` containing at least one `<step><cmd>...</cmd></step>`. Add the steps structure or convert the topic type to concept if it is not procedural.

<prodname> is present but empty.
Add a `<prodname>` element inside `<prodinfo>` within the `<prolog>`.
Example: `<prodinfo><prodname>Your Product Name</prodname></prodinfo>`
